rationale: Scope/claim-correctness lens clean. `git show 68c87106 --stat` = exactly the 3 named files (OWNERSHIP.yaml, architecture.md, ownership_wave2_test.go), +43 lines, no strays (the untracked reviews/ dir is panel scratch, not in the commit; git status otherwise clean). No double-ownership: the other three domains (context-system, core, execution) carry zero `.claude` claims and no catch-all `**` root glob, so `.claude/workflows/**` resolves to exactly one owner — no ambiguity introduced. Claim placement matches the plan (grouped with the sibling `.claude/**` claim).
